+++
title = "Unique Filename"
weight = 100
+++

<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: filesystem_unique_filename`

**Scope:** collection — runs once per collection over all its items.

## Purpose

Require that no two items in the collection share a basename.

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_unique_filename
```
